name: SuperTags

releases.author: dandele
releases.description:
## Community plugin submission release

- Compliance with Obsidian community plugin guidelines (eslint review fixes)
- Removed inline styles, moved to styles.css
- Removed plugin name from settings headings, sentence-case throughout
- Switched to fileManager.trashFile for proper trash/delete behavior
- Cleaned manifest description for submission

releases.author: dandele
releases.description:
## SuperTags

The plugin is now called **SuperTags** — a name that better communicates what it does: bring Tana-style supertags to Obsidian.

### Changes
- New plugin name: SuperTags
- New plugin ID: `supertags`
- Updated README with full feature documentation and Tana comparison table
- Improved Obsidian directory description

### No breaking changes
All existing functionality works as before. If you installed via BRAT, the update will apply automatically.
releases.name: v1.2.0 — Renamed to SuperTags

releases.author: dandele
releases.description:
## What's new

### Supertags system
Define multiple custom supertags in settings. Each has its own tag trigger, color, destination folder, frontmatter template, and body template — just like Tana supertags.

### Visual feedback
Supertag occurrences render as colored chips in the editor. The chip disappears when the cursor is on that line so you can still edit freely.

### Undo
After each atom creation, a notice appears with **Open** and **Undo** buttons (8 seconds). Undo deletes the created note and restores the original line.

### Template variables
Use `{{title}}`, `{{date}}`, `{{dateLink}}`, `{{content}}` in your frontmatter and body templates.
releases.name: v1.1.0 — Supertags + Undo + Visual Chips

releases.author: dandele
releases.description:
First beta release.

## Features
- Transforms lines tagged with `#atom` into structured atom notes
- Collects sub-bullets as note body
- Opens the new atom in a new tab
- Works on all devices via Obsidian Sync
- Configurable watch folder, notes folder, tag and debounce delay
releases.name: v1.0.0
